title: Government Chemist Conference 2026 - save the date
body: "Meet experts to discuss how measurement science and regulation can underpin effective solutions to the challenges facing the global food system.  The event will take place at Nexus, University of Leeds, Leeds on 23-24 June with remote attendance options available.  Our last conference took place in June 2023 as an online event, Safe food for tomorrow’s world– food security in challenging global conditions.  We will be announcing the programme and opening the registration in 2026, but keep in touch with updates by  following us on LinkedIn, @UK National Measurement Laboratory (NML at LGC using #GCconf2023 "
